# Arunam Catering Service

> Premium South Indian & Multi-Cuisine Catering Services in Krishnagiri & Tamil Nadu.

## Overview
Arunam Catering Service is a leading catering provider located in Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu, India. We specialize in authentic South Indian banana leaf feasts, North Indian delicacies, live counters, wedding catering, corporate events, housewarming functions, and custom party menus across Tamil Nadu.

## Key Information
- **Business Name**: Arunam Catering Service
- **Primary Location**: Krishnagiri, Tamil Nadu, India
- **Service Scope**: Krishnagiri, Hosur, Dharmapuri, Salem, Vellore, Bangalore, and across Tamil Nadu
- **Contact Numbers**: +91 81487 84305
- **Email**: arunamcateringservice@gmail.com
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/arunam_catering?igsh=ZmdhMHpleDV3b29z
- **Facebook**: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61591964292284
- **Website**: https://arunamcatering.com

## Catering Offerings
1. **Wedding Catering**: Traditional South Indian Muhurtham breakfast, grand banana leaf lunch, and evening reception live counters.
2. **Corporate Catering**: Executive lunch buffets, high tea, conference meal boxes, and team event catering.
3. **Private Events**: Birthday parties, housewarming (Gribhapravesam), baby showers, and anniversary celebrations.
4. **Live Counters & Food Stalls**: Live Dosa, Chat, Ice Cream, Pasta, Juice, Tandoori, and Mocktail counters.
